name: classic-asp-lsp
description: Classic ASP language support backed by asp-lsp.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/bundle-extension.mjs && node scripts/copy-server-runtime.mjs
scripts.package:vsix: pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/core run build && pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/language-server run build && pnpm run build && vsce package --no-dependencies --follow-symlinks
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @asp-lsp/language-server run build && pnpm run build && vitest run --passWithNoTests

aspLsp.defaultLanguage.description: Default server-side script language for Classic ASP pages.

aspLsp.checkJs.description: Enable semantic checking for client JavaScript regions.

aspLsp.javascript.unusedDiagnostics.description: Report unused JavaScript and JScript locals and parameters as hint diagnostics.

aspLsp.javascript.autoImports.description: Enable TypeScript-powered JavaScript and JScript auto import completions and quick fixes.

aspLsp.virtualRoot.description: Root directory used to resolve virtual include paths.

aspLsp.virtualRoots.description: Additional root directories used to resolve virtual include paths.

aspLsp.legacyEncoding.description: Encoding used when reading unopened include files.

aspLsp.format.indentSize.description: Indent size used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.

aspLsp.format.indentStyle.description: Indent style used by the Classic ASP formatter. When unset, editor formatting options are used.

aspLsp.format.uppercaseKeywords.description: Format VBScript keywords using uppercase spelling.

aspLsp.vbscript.typeChecking.description: Controls VBScript type diagnostics. Strict enables type mismatch, member, and call checks.

aspLsp.vbscript.comTypes.description: Custom COM type catalog keyed by Prog.ID for Server.CreateObject type checking and completion.

members.description: Members exposed by this COM object.

oneOf.description: Property type shorthand, for example String or ADODB.Recordset.

returnType.description: Method return type. Overrides type when present.

aspLsp.vbscript.unusedDiagnostics.description: Report unused VBScript declarations as hint diagnostics.

aspLsp.vbscript.includeSuggestions.description: Suggest Classic ASP include directives for undeclared VBScript symbols found in workspace files.

aspLsp.inlayHints.variableTypes.description: Show inferred VBScript variable type inlay hints.

aspLsp.inlayHints.parameterNames.description: Show VBScript procedure parameter name inlay hints.

aspLsp.inlayHints.functionReturnTypes.description: Show inferred VBScript function return type inlay hints.

aspLsp.codeLens.references.description: Show VBScript reference count CodeLens entries.

aspLsp.codeLens.includes.description: Show Classic ASP include CodeLens entries.

aspLsp.workspace.maxIndexFiles.description: Maximum number of unopened Classic ASP workspace files indexed per scan.

aspLsp.workspace.scanChunkSize.description: Number of filesystem entries processed before yielding during workspace indexing.

aspLsp.iis.url.description: URL opened by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.

aspLsp.iis.webRoot.description: Web root used by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.

aspLsp.iis.browser.description: VS Code debug type used by the Classic ASP IIS debug helper command.

aspLsp.iisExpress.url.description: URL opened by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.

aspLsp.iisExpress.webRoot.description: Web root used by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.

aspLsp.iisExpress.browser.description: VS Code debug type used by the Classic ASP IIS Express debug helper command.

commands.title: Classic ASP: Debug IIS Express URL
Classic ASP: Create Browser Launch Config

task.description: Classic ASP LSP workspace task name.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Classic ASP LSP runs local analysis and does not require workspace trust for language features.
